title: SearchResult
description: Individual search result row. Generated from `src/types::SearchResult` (v0.8.0).

titulo.description: Result title. May be replaced with url_exibicao when DDG renders 'Official site' for verified domains.

snippet.description: Result snippet text. Extracted via .result__snippet (no title+URL prefix since v0.3.0).

titulo_original.description: Original title before the 'Official site' heuristic replacement (v0.3.0+). Absent when no replacement happened.

conteudo.description: v0.9.8+: Cleaned page body (readability via Chrome/CDP) when content fetch is active. Content fetch is ON by default for top web results (FETCH_CAP=10); opt out with --no-fetch-content. Capped by --max-content-length. Absent when fetch is disabled or the URL was not among the top-N fetched.

tamanho_conteudo.description: v0.9.8+: Length of the extracted content when content fetch ran (default ON; opt-out --no-fetch-content).

metodo_extracao_conteudo.description: v0.9.8+: How the content was extracted when content fetch ran (default ON; opt-out --no-fetch-content).
